name: saul-research-thursday
description: Thursday night SEO + user pain points research
prompt:
Thursday night research session. Load .claude/skills/research/competitor-analysis.md. Focus on:
1. SEO keyword opportunities — find 5 keywords we could rank for in the next 90 days
2. User pain points — what are target customers complaining about this week?
3. Feature gap analysis — what are competitors NOT building that users want?

Create tasks for Steven (content) and Jeff (features) based on findings. Post summary to #forge-research.
